title: Who Is My Friend (WIMF)
description: Client-side friend management tool designed to help you remember everyone you meet on your Minecraft adventures.
body:
**Interface Integration**
*   Complete removal of chat commands. All management has been moved to the Graphical User Interface (GUI).
*   Added a "Friends" tab to the standard "Social Interactions" menu (Key P).
*   Added a "Settings" button (gear icon) inside the Friends tab.

**Friend List**
*   **Offline Mode:** Players remain in the list after leaving the server.
*   **Statuses:** Visual distinction between online and offline players (customizable nickname colors).
*   **Activity Tracking:** Added "Last Seen" status with a time counter.
*   **Favorites:** Ability to mark a friend with a "Star" to pin them at the top of the list during sorting.
*   **Control Buttons:** Add/Remove, Favorite, and Open Notes buttons added to each player entry.
*   **Action Confirmation:** Added a confirmation screen when removing a friend.

**Notes System**
*   Completely new GUI for note management.
*   **Grid View:** Ability to switch note display modes (1, 2, or 3 columns).
*   **Inline Editing:** Note text editing happens directly within the list entry, without opening additional windows.
*   **Bulk Deletion:** Added checkboxes for selecting multiple notes and a button to delete selected items.
*   **Visualization:** Added borders for notes, a proper scrollbar, and enlarged input fields.

**Settings and Configuration**
*   Settings menu for changing status colors (Online/Offline) via HEX codes.
*   Reworked data saving system: switched to UUID storage for correct offline player handling.

**Removed**
*   All text commands (/friend add, /friend list, etc.).
